plugin_desc: 港湾网络（Harbour Networks）路由器专用 SNMP 采集模板（企业号 8212 私有 MIB）。除标准 IF-MIB 接口指标外，额外采集港湾网络私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 平均使用率（snAgGblCpuUtil1SecAvg，直接 %）与内存（总内存 + 空闲内存，字节；使用率按 (总量-空闲)/总量 推导）。温度/风扇/电源本模板未采集，故为 N/A。适用品牌型号——港湾网络（Harbour Networks）路由器（企业号 8212）。
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: Average CPU utilisation of the Harbour Networks router (enterprise 8212 snAgGblCpuUtil1SecAvg, reported directly as a percentage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total main memory of the Harbour Networks router in bytes (enterprise 8212). The raw OID is reported in kBytes and is scaled by 1024 to bytes.

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free main memory of the Harbour Networks router in bytes (enterprise 8212). The raw OID is reported in kBytes and is scaled by 1024 to bytes.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Harbour Networks router, derived as (total-free)/total (enterprise 8212).
